pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent that runs in your terminal. It connects to multiple LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.) and provides a TUI for interactive AI- assisted development with file editing, shell commands, and MCP tool support. Pre-built binary release.

use.flag: Install clang for C/C++/Objective-C formatting (clang-format) and the clangd LSP server
Install Deno runtime for TypeScript/JavaScript LSP and formatter support
Install Elixir for mix format support
Install Gleam language toolchain for gleam format and gleam lsp
Install Go toolchain and gopls for Go formatting (gofmt) and LSP support
Install Node.js for npm-based MCP servers and project-local formatters/LSP servers
Install ruff for Python formatting and linting
Install Rust toolchain (rustfmt) and rust-analyzer for Rust language support
Install shfmt for shell script formatting
Install Terraform/OpenTofu and terraform-ls for HCL formatting and LSP support
Install uv for Python package management and uvx-based MCP server execution
Install Zig toolchain for zig fmt and zig LSP support
